title: Team Capes
description: 🟦 Shows team colored capes, for players in teams. 🟥
body:
![Team Capes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Sw4LxdbE/images/c4fde7d8985b521b785fb2e77d95560616c64ce8.png)

### Shows team colored capes, for players in teams.

## 🟦 Features 🟥

Relies on vanilla teams, and their assigned color.

What cape is shown for a player:
- Without team -> original (if there is)
- With team, that has no color -> original (if there is)
- With team, that has color -> showing team cape (for example blue cape for the blue team)

![Players](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Sw4LxdbE/images/bf8e0ef5b77acfaf7e8515549044fca654a04f05.png)

## 🤝 Compatibility

- ✅ Capes
- ✅ Wavy Capes
